# Chenglin Pua Official Website

Official website: https://puachenglin.github.io/chenglinpua/

Chenglin Pua is a Malaysian PhD candidate in Materials Science at Tsinghua University. His work focuses on advanced electron microscopy, scanning transmission electron microscopy, multi-slice electron ptychography, depth-resolved phase imaging, atomic-resolution materials characterization, diamond, 2D materials, hydrogen atoms and lunar samples.

Important pages:
- Home: https://puachenglin.github.io/chenglinpua/
- Research: https://puachenglin.github.io/chenglinpua/research/
- Articles: https://puachenglin.github.io/chenglinpua/articles/
- Gallery: https://puachenglin.github.io/chenglinpua/gallery/
- Personal: https://puachenglin.github.io/chenglinpua/personal/

External profiles:
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=OSv_Bm4AAAAJ&hl=en
- ResearchGate: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Pua-Chenglin/
- GitHub: https://github.com/puachenglin
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@AtomiMuseum/
